---
name: Bug report
about: Report an architectural inconsistency, bug, or implementation issue
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

**Describe the issue**
A clear description of what's wrong.

**Related component/file**
Which file or part of the Runtime Stack does this relate to? (e.g., `core/memory/`, Card 03, a specific tool contract)

**Why it matters**
Architectural conflict, security gap, incorrect behavior, etc.

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant — logs, screenshots, links to the master execution plan section.
